source: Baseball Savant Statcast park factors (savant.mlb.com/leaderboard/statcast-park-factors), 2024 single-season HR factor — 100 = league average; we store as normalized 1.00 = average.
_notes: Park factors normalised so 1.00 = league average HR rate for that season.
Park-relocation history: Oakland Athletics played at the Coliseum (ATH) in 2024; future seasons may need a Sutter Health Park entry. Single park per park_id for v1 (consistent with park geometry).
Domes / retractable roofs (TB, MIA, MIL, TOR, TEX, ARI/AZ, HOU, SEA) include weather effects we exclude from the canonical sanity input — expect some rank-correlation slack for those parks.
Use the year that matches the model's validation year (default: 2024).
